---
name: Model behavior report
about: The agent did something dumb/unsafe — wrong edits, loops, ignored instructions
labels: model-behavior
---

> These are triaged separately from bugs: often the fix is prompt tuning
> (per-model-family addenda in `src/core/system-prompt.ts`) or a guardrail,
> not a code defect.
